name: Longer ragne kilier
description: The Longer ragne kilier (LRK) is a Bandit shotgun that can roll very high damage and fire rate. With a Hyperion barrel it gains much tighter pellet spread, making it unusually effective at mid-range for a Bandit shotgun. The barrel lowers listed damage, but the narrower cone helps more pellets hit. It is poor for panic firing: no multi-barrel burst and the spread is too tight for spray-and-pray. Best used up close with deliberate aim, especially for critical hits. It usually has around two fewer rounds than most Bandit shotguns, and its long reload can punish prolonged fights.
notes: Random world drop. Name is a misspelt play on "Longer Range Killer". Without an accessory or elemental capacitor it uses the prefix "Huntining". Closest Scav analogue in Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel is the Straight-Shooter.
